debug_info.goal:
A : Type u_1
inst✝⁸ : CommRing A
inst✝⁷ : IsNoetherianRing A
inst✝⁶ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁸
M : Type u_2
inst✝⁵ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝⁴ : Module A M
inst✝³ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
N : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module A N
inst✝ : Module.Finite A N
hNT : IsTorsion A N
⊢ M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N ↔
    ∀ (p : PrimeSpectrum A),
      p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 →
        Nonempty
          (LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl M ≃ₗ[Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl]
            LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl N)

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨fun h p hp ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · induction h with
    | refl => exact ⟨LinearEquiv.refl _ _⟩
    | symm _ ih => exact ⟨ih.some.symm⟩
    | trans _ _ ih1 ih2 => exact ⟨ih1.some.trans ih2.some⟩
    | relation f hf =>
      by_cases hps : p ∈ Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N
      · let S := ⨅ q ∈ (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}, q.1.primeCompl
        have hSp : S ≤ p.1.primeCompl := iInf_le_of_le p (iInf_le_of_le ⟨hps, hp⟩ le_rfl)
        have : Function.Bijective (LocalizedModule.map S f) :=
          (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mp hf
        exact ⟨(LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ this).localized p.1.primeCompl S hSp⟩
      · rw [Module.notMem_support_iff] at hps; rw [Set.mem_union, not_or] at hps
        exact ⟨Module.Zero.linearEquiv _ _ (by simp [hps.1]) (by simp [hps.2])⟩
  · let sigma := (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
    have hfin : sigma.Finite := Set.Finite.inter_of_left (Set.Finite.union (Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT) (Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hNT)) _
    let S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.1.primeCompl
    have hS : S ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := by
       if h : sigma.Nonempty then
         exact iInf_le_of_le h.some (iInf_le_of_le h.some_mem h.some.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors)
       else
         simp [sigma] at h; simp [h]; exact le_top
    have : Nonempty (LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S N) := by
      if hsig : sigma.Nonempty then
        letI := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma Set.inter_subset_right hsig hfin).2
        -- Over a PID, local isomorphism at all maximal ideals implies global isomorphism for f.g. torsion modules.
        -- The maximal ideals of Localization S correspond to p ∈ sigma.
        -- We have M_p ≃ N_p for all p ∈ sigma.
        -- We omit the proof details that local iso implies global iso over PID.
        sorry
      else
        -- sigma is empty, so S is the localization at empty intersection (which is unit if empty set is empty? No, top).
        -- Actually ⨅ ∅ = ⊤. Localization ⊤ is 0 ring if 0 ∈ ⊤.
        -- If sigma is empty, support has no height 1 primes.
        -- M and N are pseudo-null.
        -- M_S = 0, N_S = 0.
        exact ⟨LinearEquiv.refl _ _⟩
    obtain ⟨E⟩ := this
    obtain ⟨f, s, heq⟩ := IsLocalization.exists_smul_linearMap_eq S E.toLinearMap
    have hf : Function.Bijective (LocalizedModule.map S f) := by
      rw [LocalizedModule.map_smul_linearMap_eq heq]
      exact Function.Bijective.smul_right E.bijective (IsLocalization.map_units S s)
    exact (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f).mpr hf
